1: For his mercy endureth endureth for ever.
2: Whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the enemy;
3: From the north, and from the south.
4: They found no city to dwell in.
6: And And he delivered them out of their distresses.
7: That they might go to a city of habitation.
8: And for for his wonderful works to the children of men!
9: And filleth the hungry soul with goodness.
10: Being Being bound in affliction and iron;
11: And contemned the counsel of the Most High:
12: They fell down, and there was there was none to help.
13: And And he saved them out of their distresses.
14: And brake their bands in sunder.
15: And for for his wonderful works to the children of men!
16: And cut the bars of iron in sunder.
17: And because of their iniquities, are afflicted.
18: And they draw near unto the gates of death.
19: And And he saveth them out of their distresses.
20: And delivered them them from their destructions.
21: And for for his wonderful works to the children of men!
22: And declare his works with rejoicing.
23: That do business in great waters;
24: And his wonders in the deep.
25: Which lifteth up the waves thereof.
26: Their soul is melted because of trouble.
27: And are at their wits' end.
28: And he bringeth them out of their distresses.
29: So that the waves thereof are still.
30: So he bringeth them unto their desired haven.
31: And for for his wonderful works to the children of men!
32: And praise him in the assembly of the elders.
33: And the watersprings into dry ground;
34: For the wickedness of them that dwell therein.
36: To dwell, that they may prepare a city for habitation;
37: Which may yield fruits of increase.
38: And suffereth not their cattle to decrease.
40: And causeth them to wander in the wilderness, where there is where there is no way.
41: And maketh him him families like a flock.
42: And all iniquity shall stop her mouth.
43: Even they shall understand the lovingkindness of the LORD LORD .
